seoTitle: St Fillans vs St George — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Fillans and St George. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Fillans vs St George: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Fillans and St George.
heading: St Fillans vs St George — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Fillans, New South Wales and St George, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St George has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to St Fillans (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Fillans or St George safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Fillans has a flood risk score of 49/100, while St George scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Fillans scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. St George scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Fillans or St George?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St George has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
